Home / Service Areas / Plainfield

Painting in Plainfield, IN

Trusted local professionals serving Plainfield and surrounding communities

Serving Plainfield, IN

Plainfield, IN, is a welcoming community with a range of home styles and excellent schools. Apex Painting provides professional painting services to keep your home looking its best year-round. Our exterior solutions are built to withstand cold winters with snow and ice, while our interior work brings new life to your living spaces.

Plainfield is home to the Indianapolis International Airport, parks, and shopping districts.

Painting Services in Plainfield

Interior Painting

Breathe new life into your living spaces with our precision interior painting.

Learn more →

Exterior Painting

Protect and beautify your home's exterior against Indiana's harsh elements.

Learn more →

Cabinet Refinishing

Transform your kitchen without the cost of full replacement.

Learn more →

Deck Staining

Protect and enhance your outdoor living space against Indiana's elements.

Learn more →

Drywall Repair

Flawless solutions for Indianapolis' common wall imperfections.

Learn more →

Popcorn Ceiling Removal

Modernize your space by eliminating outdated textured ceilings.

Learn more →

Color Consultation

Expert guidance selecting perfect hues for your Indianapolis home.

Learn more →

Need Painting in Plainfield?

Contact us today for a free estimate. We provide professional, reliable service throughout Plainfield and the surrounding area.
